name: Lilly Looking Through
short_description: What Lilly sees is about to change her life forever.... Help our heroine through a variety of enchanting environments brimming with magic and wonder, as she seeks to rewrite the past, change the present, and unlock the ultimate mystery. Geeta Games presents an animated point-and-click adventure for all ages: Lilly Looking Through.
detailed_description:
What Lilly sees is about to change her life forever....
Help our heroine through a variety of enchanting environments brimming with magic and wonder, as she seeks to rewrite the past, change the present, and unlock the ultimate mystery. Geeta Games presents an animated point-and-click adventure for all ages:
Lilly Looking Through.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
